title: 🎉 Congratulations!
lead: You have learned about all communication channels used by SAC customers.

lojas.title: Stores
lojas.text: Store registration → SAC takes over analysis → Final response

email.title: Email
email.text: Email received → Automatic case → SAC Screening

common.title: What do they all have in common?
common.text: All channels guarantee proper registration, agile handling, and complete traceability of the service.

next.title: Next Step
next.text: Now let's practice! In the following exercise, you will order the steps of each service flow.
